description_long: This is a modern suburban house surrounded by a tall, dense row of conical evergreen trees forming a privacy barrier on all sides. The house features a light-colored exterior with horizontal siding, a flat roof over the main structure, and a prominent dark hip roof over the attached garage. The front of the house includes a covered porch supported by columns, a paved driveway leading to a two-car garage, and a small landscaped area with shrubs. The backyard is spacious and open, bordered by the same evergreen trees, and contains a single decorative tree. Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small set of steps and a sheltered porch area.
description: A modern, light-colored suburban house with a flat main roof, attached hip-roof garage, and surrounded by tall evergreen trees. Features a covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a spacious backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, attached garage with hip roof, and driveway flanked by evergreens.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the dense row of evergreens enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, minimal windows, and the privacy provided by the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a decorative tree in the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, small steps, and a central door flanked by windows
